wordplay_note: The cheerful Elijah — the returning prophet
card_description: Elias Tate (meaning "Elias = Elijah; Tate = cheerful") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Hermit-prophet on an alien world who protects Emmanuel. Name note: The cheerful Elijah — the returning prophet. The Elijah figure who prepares the way for the Messiah's return. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Hermit-prophet on an alien world who protects Emmanuel
reference.significance: The Elijah figure who prepares the way for the Messiah's return
